title: calophyllum tetrapterum var. blumutense
intro: Calophyllum tetrapterum var. blumutense, a lesser-known variant of the Calophyllum tetrapterum tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin infections, and fever, due to its potential health benefits such as promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Calophyllum tetrapterum var. blumutense typically involve the extraction of its leaves and bark, which can be used to create ointments, tinctures, or teas for medicinal purposes.
